evals.prompt: What copilot customizations do I have in this repo?
evals.expected_output: A structured inventory table listing all discovered copilot files grouped by kind (guidance, agents, skills, prompts, hooks, mcp, settings), with target visibility (IDE/CLI/both) and scope for each.

assertions.name: finds-agents
assertions.description: Report must discover the planner agent

assertions.name: finds-skills
assertions.description: Report must discover the refactor skill

assertions.name: classifies-target
assertions.description: Report must classify artifacts by target visibility

assertions.name: structured-output
assertions.description: Report uses table format for structured presentation

evals.prompt: Are there any conflicts between my Copilot IDE and Copilot CLI configs? I think they might be out of sync.
evals.expected_output: An audit report identifying conflicts, lossy mappings (prompts only visible to IDE, commands only visible to CLI), MCP drift between .vscode/mcp.json and .github/mcp.json absence, cross-read warnings for CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md, and specific reconciliation recommendations.

assertions.name: identifies-lossy-mapping
assertions.description: Report identifies that .prompt.md files are IDE-only (lossy for CLI)

assertions.name: identifies-cross-read
assertions.description: Report warns about CLAUDE.md/GEMINI.md being cross-read by IDE

evals.prompt: Delete the copilot agent called 'planner' — I don't use it anymore.
evals.expected_output: A deletion report showing: the file found (.github/agents/planner.agent.md), its content summary, any references to 'planner' in other files, confirmation of deletion, and cleanup status.

assertions.name: finds-planner-file
assertions.description: Report identifies the planner agent file

assertions.name: shows-content-summary
assertions.description: Report shows a summary of the file content before deletion

assertions.name: checks-references
assertions.description: Report checks for references to planner in other files

assertions.name: confirms-deletion
assertions.description: Report confirms the file was deleted or removed
